response.text:
I can’t safely re-apply the full flow because the verified source set in this turn does not include an exact TekAutomate SCPI command for reading back the three measurement results.

ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Insufficient verification for the measurement result readback commands, so no applyable changes were emitted.","findings":["Verified commands were found for channel setup, edge trigger setup, acquisition control, measurement creation, waveform save, and screenshot save, but not for the exact query form needed to read all three measurement results."],"suggestedFixes":["Provide the verified result-query command for measurement badges, or allow a flow that stops after creating the three measurements without the readback queries."],"actions":[]}

actionsJson.summary: Insufficient verification for the measurement result readback commands, so no applyable changes were emitted.
findings: Verified commands were found for channel setup, edge trigger setup, acquisition control, measurement creation, waveform save, and screenshot save, but not for the exact query form needed to read all three measurement results.
suggestedFixes: Provide the verified result-query command for measurement badges, or allow a flow that stops after creating the three measurements without the readback queries.
